rows.label: qev014401_MSG0001
rows.name:
My track record is definitely
better! And yet, what the hell...
This is absolutely discrimination![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014401_MSG0002
rows.name:
...Hey, you there! I don't
know who you are, but just
listen to what I have to say![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014401_JNK0010
rows.name: Affirm

rows.label: qev014401_SEL0011
rows.name: Lend an ear to Rosie's story.

rows.label: qev014401_JNK0020
rows.name: Deny

rows.label: qev014401_SEL0021
rows.name:
Assume it will take a
while and leave the area.

rows.label: qev014401_MSG0003
rows.name: Phew—! Alright, here I go![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014401_MSG0004
rows.name:
No way! I won't let you escape! Because if
I don't vent this anger right now, I feel
like I'm going to lose my mind, okay!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014401_MSG0005
rows.name:
Listen, the water purification plant
outside NLA that our research team was
working on is finally complete, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014401_MSG0006
rows.name:
And then, all the team members
moved over to the Biahno Water
Purification Plant, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014401_MSG0007
rows.name:
For some reason, I was the only one left behind!
And right in the middle of that, a girl from the
same team... Ajoa got promoted, they say![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014401_MSG0008
rows.name:
Why!? Isn't this discrimination?
If I sued them, I'd win, right?
Hey, what do you think?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014401_JNK0030
rows.name: Console

rows.label: qev014401_SEL0031
rows.name: Nod along, saying Rosie is not at fault.

rows.label: qev014401_JNK0040
rows.name: Guess

rows.label: qev014401_SEL0041
rows.name:
Speculate that Rosie was left
out because she's too loud.

rows.label: qev014401_MSG0009
rows.name:
Yes, yes, exactly! You understand
pretty well, don't you?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014401_MSG0010
rows.name:
Haaah? I'll crush you, you know?
There's no way that's the case.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014401_MSG0011
rows.name:
It's definitely because Ajoa is jussst
a little bit cuter than me... They
took her for such a sketchy reason![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014401_MSG0012
rows.name:
By now, I bet Ajoa is using the mission
as an excuse to enjoy a vacation by
the lake with Ian and the others![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014401_MSG0013
rows.name:
I mean, they haven't even made
their regular check-ins, you know?
Neglect of duty! It's sabotage![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014401_MSG0014
rows.name:
Aaah! Mixing public and private
matters is unforgivable![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014401_MSG0015
rows.name:
...Hey, could you go check on them for me?
If they're slacking off, slap Ajoa across
the face and wake her up, will you?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014401_MSG0016
rows.name:
You can go all out, okay? Make them
understand the depth of my anger![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014401_MSG0017
rows.name:
Use your power to turn that Biahno
Water Purification Plant, enveloped
in a festive mood, into a living hell![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014401_MSG0018
rows.name:
The Biahno Water Purification Plant is on the
west side of NLA. I hear dangerous monsters
appear around there, so you'd better be careful.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014401_MSG0019
rows.name:
Ah, welcome back! How was it?
Did you slap the slacking Ajoa
right across her face?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014401_MSG0020
rows.name:
...Eh? The staff died,
leaving Ajoa behind?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014401_MSG0021
rows.name:
And Ajoa had an egg implanted inside her
body and went into surgery to have it
removed...? No way... you're lying, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014401_JNK0050
rows.name: Explain

rows.label: qev014401_SEL0051
rows.name:
Show the researchers' ID cards
as proof you aren't lying.

rows.label: qev014401_JNK0060
rows.name: Sarcasm

rows.label: qev014401_SEL0061
rows.name:
Say that things went exactly as Rosie,
who wished for their misfortune, wanted.

rows.label: qev014401_MSG0022
rows.name:
It's true... These are everyone's
ID cards... No way... they were
all important comrades...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014401_MSG0023
rows.name:
There's no way... that's true. The reason
I hated being left behind was because
they were all important comrades...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014401_MSG0024
rows.name:
...I'll go check on Ajoa right
away. Here, this is my thanks for
saving her life. Please take it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014401_MSG0025
rows.name:
Ah, welcome back! How was it?
Did you slap the slacking Ajoa
right across her face?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014401_MSG0026
rows.name: ...Eh? The staff was wiped out?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014401_MSG0027
rows.name:
What's that... Ajoa also had
an egg implanted in her body
and turned into a monster...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014401_JNK0070
rows.name: Explain

rows.label: qev014401_SEL0071
rows.name:
Show the researchers' ID cards
as proof you aren't lying.

rows.label: qev014401_JNK0080
rows.name: Sarcasm

rows.label: qev014401_SEL0081
rows.name:
Say that things went exactly as Rosie,
who wished for their misfortune, wanted.

rows.label: qev014401_MSG0028
rows.name:
It's true... These are everyone's
ID cards... No way... they were
all important comrades...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014401_MSG0029
rows.name:
Is this because I wished for everyone's
misfortune... for Ajoa's misfortune?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014401_JNK0080
rows.name: [ST:space ]

rows.label: qev014401_MSG0030
rows.name:
There's no way... that's true. The reason
I hated being left behind was because
they were all important comrades...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014401_MSG0031
rows.name:
But... is all of this because I
wished for everyone's misfortune...
for Ajoa's misfortune?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014401_MSG0032
rows.name: ...What have I done...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014401_MSG0033
rows.name:
Ahh... A woman whose very heart is
as ugly as mine should have been
the one to turn into a monster...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014401_MSG0034
rows.name:
Ahh... sorry, this is your
reward... I am truly sorry...[ST:wait ]
